description: Legal document, of an unidentified type, in Arabic Document script. Probably related to a payment. Mentions a payment to Muʿallam Ibrahem bin Naʿīm Bu-Saʿad[?] al-Ḥakīm al-Yahūdī. Dated 2 Shawwal ___ AH. Has an ʿalāma "al-ḥamdu li-lāh rabb al-ʿālamīn" at the top and two witness signatures at the bottom. The line after the ʿalāma in an elongated script reads as "qāʾima" literally meaning table. Requires further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
